productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Golden Strap Brown Handbag
description: Update your style quotient with ease by adding this stylish bag from lino perros. Roomy and comfortable to carry, the smooth silhouette of this bag blends well with any outfit. Made of Leatherette with a quilted design for durability Has two zippered compartments with an inner zipper and organiser sleeves for a mobile and essentials Two short handles comprising of metallic chains and Leatherette for carrying ease and style One magnetic closure compartment on the front for additional space Two zippered pockets on the front and back for additional space Metallic embelishment with brand name on the front Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
